title: adonis amurensis var. ramosa
intro: Adonis amurensis var. ramosa, also known as the Korean mountain adonis, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the buttercup family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Adonis amurensis var. ramosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Adonis amurensis var. ramosa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
